children.heading: Coordination of activities
children.label: a Coordination of activities
children.text: The Secretary shall coordinate all activities outside of the United States under this chapter with other Federal officials, departments, agencies, and international organizations, as the President may require.

children.heading: Assistance
children.label: b Assistance
children.text: The Secretary may provide assistance, as determined appropriate by the Secretary to carry out this chapter, including technical and financial assistance, equipment, and facilities without reimbursement.
